message:
Command `# The config.json was reset - it lost our fixes. Check what it now has vs what we need
python3 -c "
import json
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json') as f:
    cfg = json.load(f)
# Check for our critical fixes
print('FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS:', cfg.get('FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS'))  # needs False
print('CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE:', cfg.get('CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE'))  # needs False
print('GRT_ADJUSTMENT:', cfg.get('GRT_ADJUSTMENT'))  # needs 0.2
print('RUN_IRDROP_REPORT:', cfg.get('RUN_IRDROP_REPORT'))
print('ERROR_ON_MAGIC_DRC:', cfg.get('ERROR_ON_MAGIC_DRC'))
print('MAGIC_DEF_LABELS:', cfg.get('MAGIC_DEF_LABELS'))
# Check if mcu_chip.v was added
vf = cfg.get('VERILOG_FILES', [])
has_chip = any('mcu_chip' in v for v in vf)
print('mcu_chip.v included:', has_chip)
# Check SKIP_STEPS for CTS
print('SKIP_STEPS:', cfg.get('SKIP_STEPS', 'not set'))
"` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# The config.json was reset - it lost our fixes. Check what it now has vs what we need
python3 -c "
import json
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json') as f:
    cfg = json.load(f)
# Check for our critical fixes
print('FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS:', cfg.get('FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS'))  # needs False
print('CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE:', cfg.get('CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE'))  # needs False
print('GRT_ADJUSTMENT:', cfg.get('GRT_ADJUSTMENT'))  # needs 0.2
print('RUN_IRDROP_REPORT:', cfg.get('RUN_IRDROP_REPORT'))
print('ERROR_ON_MAGIC_DRC:', cfg.get('ERROR_ON_MAGIC_DRC'))
print('MAGIC_DEF_LABELS:', cfg.get('MAGIC_DEF_LABELS'))
# Check if mcu_chip.v was added
vf = cfg.get('VERILOG_FILES', [])
has_chip = any('mcu_chip' in v for v in vf)
print('mcu_chip.v included:', has_chip)
# Check SKIP_STEPS for CTS
print('SKIP_STEPS:', cfg.get('SKIP_STEPS', 'not set'))
"
